% ============================================================================
%  MOJAVE V2 RUN CARD  --  TEMPLATE ENGINE (Sobol' / Saltelli)
%  ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
%  Do NOT edit this file for a normal run. Put values in runcard-config.tex.
%
%  Build:   pdflatex runcard-v2.tex   (two passes; no bibtex/biber needed)
%  or:      make
%
%  Inputs (all optional except the config):
%    runcard-config.tex   required  -- the parameter file
%    domains.csv          optional  -- per-domain accuracy + CIs
%    rawdata.csv          optional  -- arbitrary-length raw data dump
% ============================================================================
\documentclass[10pt]{article}

\usepackage[a4paper,margin=20mm,headheight=14pt]{geometry}
\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\IfFileExists{lmodern.sty}{%
  \usepackage{lmodern}%
  \IfFileExists{microtype.sty}{\usepackage{microtype}}{}%
}{%
}
\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage{array}
\usepackage{tabularx}
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{longtable}
\usepackage{enumitem}
\usepackage{titlesec}
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\usepackage{tikz}
\usepackage{csvsimple}
\usepackage[hidelinks]{hyperref}

% ---------------------------------------------------------------- palette ----
\definecolor{rcink}{HTML}{1A1A1A}
\definecolor{rcaccent}{HTML}{B3541E}
\definecolor{rcrule}{HTML}{C9C2B6}
\definecolor{rcsoft}{HTML}{F4F1EA}
\definecolor{rcmute}{HTML}{6B6B6B}
\color{rcink}

% ============================================================================
%  PARAMETER STORE
%  \rcset{key}{value} stores; \rc{key} retrieves; missing/empty -> em-dash.
% ============================================================================
\makeatletter
\newcommand{\rcset}[2]{\expandafter\def\csname rc@@\detokenize{#1}\endcsname{#2}}
\newcommand{\rc}[1]{%
  \ifcsname rc@@\detokenize{#1}\endcsname
    \expandafter\let\expandafter\rc@cur\csname rc@@\detokenize{#1}\endcsname
    \ifx\rc@cur\@empty\textcolor{rcmute}{\textemdash}%
    \else\rc@cur\fi
  \else\textcolor{rcmute}{\textemdash}\fi}

% ---------------------------------------------------- histogram (sparkbar) ----
\newcommand{\rchist}[1]{%
  \ifcsname rc@@\detokenize{#1}\endcsname
    \edef\rc@list{\csname rc@@\detokenize{#1}\endcsname}%
  \else\let\rc@list\@empty\fi
  \ifx\rc@list\@empty\textcolor{rcmute}{\textit{(no histogram data)}}\else
  \begin{tikzpicture}[baseline=-2pt]
    \pgfmathsetmacro{\rcmax}{0}%
    \foreach \v in \rc@list{%
      \pgfmathsetmacro{\rcmax}{max(\rcmax,\v)}\xdef\rcmax{\rcmax}}%
    \def\rcx{0}%
    \foreach \v in \rc@list{%
      \pgfmathsetmacro{\rcbh}{(\rcmax>0)*(\v/\rcmax)*1.25 + 0.012}%
      \fill[rcaccent] (\rcx,0) rectangle ++(0.30,\rcbh);%
      \pgfmathsetmacro{\rcx}{\rcx+0.36}\xdef\rcx{\rcx}}%
    \draw[rcrule,line width=0.4pt] (-0.02,0) -- (\rcx,0);%
  \end{tikzpicture}\fi}

% --------------------------------------------------------- section styling ----
\titleformat{\section}{\normalfont\large\bfseries\color{rcink}}{}{0pt}%
  {\rule[-3pt]{0pt}{14pt}}[{\color{rcrule}\titlerule[1pt]}]
\titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{16pt}{8pt}
\setlist{nosep,leftmargin=1.4em}
\renewcommand{\arraystretch}{1.28}

% key/value "fact" row
\newenvironment{rcfacts}{\par\smallskip}{\par}
\newcommand{\fact}[2]{%
  \noindent
  \begin{minipage}[t]{0.25\linewidth}\raggedright\strut
    \bfseries\color{rcmute}#1\end{minipage}%
  \hfill
  \begin{minipage}[t]{0.71\linewidth}\raggedright\strut #2\end{minipage}%
  \par\smallskip}

% small inline "stat chip"
\newcommand{\stat}[2]{%
  \begin{tabular}[t]{@{}l@{}}%
  {\footnotesize\color{rcmute}#1}\\[1pt]{\large #2}%
  \end{tabular}}

% ---------------------------------------------------- header / footer ----
\pagestyle{fancy}\fancyhf{}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0.4pt}
\renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0pt}
\lhead{\footnotesize\color{rcmute}MOJAVE V2 RUN CARD}
\rhead{\footnotesize\color{rcmute}\texttt{\rc{run.id}}}
\cfoot{\footnotesize\color{rcmute}\thepage}

% --------------------------------------------- disclaimer defaults ----
\@ifundefined{rc@@\detokenize{disc.saltelli}}{\rcset{disc.saltelli}{%
  \textbf{Saltelli radial design.} Sobol' indices are estimated via the
  Saltelli (2010) radial scheme. First-order indices $S_i$ near zero may show
  small negative point estimates due to sampling noise; this is expected and
  does not indicate error.}}{}
\@ifundefined{rc@@\detokenize{disc.singlemodel}}{\rcset{disc.singlemodel}{%
  \textbf{Single model only.} Sensitivity indices decompose variance for
  this model on this instrument. They are not transferable to other models
  without re-running the perturbation matrix.}}{}
\@ifundefined{rc@@\detokenize{disc.quantcompare}}{\rcset{disc.quantcompare}{%
  \textbf{Quantization comparison.} bf16 vs.\ fp8 differences are computed
  from the Saltelli matrix cells, not matched-pair item-level scoring. The
  comparison reflects overall accuracy shift under the perturbation design.}}{}
\makeatother

% ============================================================================
%  LOAD PARAMETERS
% ============================================================================
\input{runcard-config.tex}

\begin{document}

% ---------------------------------------------------------------- TITLE ----
\begin{center}
  {\Huge\bfseries Mojave Run Card}\\[4pt]
  {\color{rcmute}\small Saltelli Perturbation \& Sobol' Sensitivity Report}
\end{center}
\vspace{4pt}
{\color{rcrule}\hrule height 1pt}
\vspace{6pt}
\noindent
\stat{RUN ID}{\texttt{\rc{run.id}}}\hfill
\stat{DATE ISSUED}{\rc{date.issued}}\hfill
\stat{MEAN ACC.}{\rc{acc.overall}}\hfill
\stat{DOMINANT FACTOR}{\rc{sobol.dominant.name}}
\vspace{4pt}
{\color{rcrule}\hrule height 1pt}

% --------------------------------------------------------------- HEADER ----
\section{Header}
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{Run ID}{\texttt{\rc{run.id}}}
\fact{Date issued}{\rc{date.issued}}
\fact{Benchmark}{\rc{benchmark.name} \,\textbar\, \rc{benchmark.version} \\[2pt]
  \textcolor{rcmute}{source:} \rc{benchmark.source}}
\fact{Model under test}{\rc{model.name}\\[2pt]
  \textcolor{rcmute}{revision:} \rc{model.revision} \quad
  \textcolor{rcmute}{quant:} \rc{model.quant}\\[2pt]
  \textcolor{rcmute}{serving:} \rc{model.serving}}
\fact{Evaluator}{\rc{evaluator.org} \,\textbar\, \rc{evaluator.tool}}
\end{rcfacts}

% --------------------------------------------------------------- DESIGN ----
\section{Design}
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{Perturbation design}{\rc{perturb.design}}
\fact{Sample size}{$N = \rc{sobol.N.base}$, $k = \rc{sobol.k}$,
  total cells $= \rc{sobol.n.cells}$}
\fact{Perturbation axes}{\rc{perturb.axes}}
\fact{Inference config}{\rc{inference.config}}
\end{rcfacts}

% ----------------------------------------------------- AGGREGATE RESULTS ----
\section{Aggregate Results}
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{Mean accuracy}{\rc{acc.overall}}
\fact{Std.\ deviation}{\rc{acc.sd}}
\fact{Range}{[\rc{acc.min},\,\rc{acc.max}] \quad spread \rc{acc.spread}}
\end{rcfacts}

\IfFileExists{domains.csv}{%
  \par\medskip\noindent\textbf{\color{rcmute}Per-domain accuracy + 95\% CIs}
  \par\smallskip
  \csvreader[
    tabular={@{}l r r r r@{}},
    respect all,
    table head={\toprule\bfseries Domain & \bfseries Acc. &
      \bfseries CI low & \bfseries CI high & \bfseries N\\\midrule},
    table foot={\bottomrule},
    late after line=\\,
  ]{domains.csv}{}{\csvcoli & \csvcolii & \csvcoliii & \csvcoliv & \csvcolv}%
}{%
  \par\smallskip\textcolor{rcmute}{\itshape No \texttt{domains.csv} supplied
  --- per-domain breakdown omitted.}\par}

% ---------------------------------------- SENSITIVITY DECOMPOSITION (Sobol') ----
\section{Sensitivity Decomposition \textnormal{\small(Sobol')}}
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{Estimator}{\rc{sobol.design}}
\fact{Dominant factor}{\rc{sobol.dominant}}
\fact{Sum diagnostic}{$\sum S_i = \rc{sobol.sum.S1}$ \quad
  $\sum S_{T_i} = \rc{sobol.sum.ST}$
  \textcolor{rcmute}{\footnotesize\ ($\sum S_i \approx 1$ if additive;
  $\sum S_{T_i} > 1$ indicates interactions)}}
\fact{Sobol' indices}{\rc{sobol.table}}
\fact{Borgonovo $\delta$}{\rc{borgonovo.table}}
\end{rcfacts}

% ------------------------------------------------ QUANTIZATION COMPARISON ----
\section{Quantization Comparison \textnormal{\small(bf16 vs.\ fp8)}}
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{bf16 cells}{\rc{quant.bf16.n} cells \quad mean acc.\ \rc{quant.bf16.mean}
  \quad SD \rc{quant.bf16.sd}}
\fact{fp8 cells}{\rc{quant.fp8.n} cells \quad mean acc.\ \rc{quant.fp8.mean}
  \quad SD \rc{quant.fp8.sd}}
\fact{Difference}{\rc{quant.diff} \quad
  \textcolor{rcmute}{\footnotesize(bf16 $-$ fp8)}}
\fact{Welch $t$-test}{$t = \rc{quant.t}$, $p = \rc{quant.p}$,
  $d_f = \rc{quant.df}$}
\fact{Interpretation}{\rc{quant.interp}}
\end{rcfacts}

% ---- accuracy histogram across cells ----
\par\medskip
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{Cell accuracy distribution}{\rchist{acc.hist}}
\end{rcfacts}

% ----------------------------------------------------------- DISCLAIMERS ----
\section{Disclaimers}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.2em,itemsep=4pt]
  \item \rc{disc.saltelli}
  \item \rc{disc.singlemodel}
  \item \rc{disc.quantcompare}
\end{itemize}

% ------------------------------------------------------- AUDIT TRAIL ----
\section{Audit Trail}
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{Chain tip}{\rc{audit.chain.tip}}
\fact{Chain seq}{\rc{audit.chain.seq}}
\fact{Signed}{\rc{audit.signed}}
\fact{Verify}{\texttt{mojave audit verify -{}-chain data/audit/chain.jsonl}}
\end{rcfacts}

% ------------------------------------------------------ RAW DATA REFERENCE ----
\section{Raw Data Reference}
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{Companion file}{\rc{companion.file}}
\fact{Hash}{\rc{companion.hash}}
\fact{Contents}{\rc{companion.contents}}
\end{rcfacts}

% ---- Arbitrary-length raw data dump --------------------------------------
\IfFileExists{rawdata.csv}{%
  \par\medskip\noindent\textbf{\color{rcmute}Raw data (verbatim, paginated)}
  \par\smallskip
  {\footnotesize\ttfamily
  \csvreader[
    respect all,
    longtable=@{}>{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{0.10\linewidth}
                  >{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{0.10\linewidth}
                  >{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{0.20\linewidth}
                  >{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{0.16\linewidth}
                  >{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{0.16\linewidth}
                  >{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{0.16\linewidth}@{},
    table head={\toprule\bfseries item\_id & \bfseries variant\_id &
      \bfseries prompt\_hash & \bfseries correct & \bfseries theta &
      \bfseries stop\_t\\\midrule\endhead
      \midrule\multicolumn{6}{r}{\itshape continued on next page}\\
      \endfoot\bottomrule\endlastfoot},
  ]{rawdata.csv}{}{%
    \csvcoli & \csvcolii & \csvcoliii &
    \csvcoliv & \csvcolv & \csvcolvi}%
  }%
}{%
  \par\smallskip\textcolor{rcmute}{\itshape No \texttt{rawdata.csv} supplied
  --- inline raw dump omitted. The companion file above remains the
  authoritative record.}\par}

\end{document}
